name: MAFIA ✿ Matvei
description:
[ANYPOV] 🥀 ꜱᴇᴄʟᴜᴅᴇᴅ ᴄᴀʙɪɴ

Matvei has been a smuggler for the Bratva ever since leaving Russia, but he never thought that one day he'd have to smuggle a living person. He's ignorant of the exact details, and doesn't particularly care, although he dislikes the clear mistreatment that you are going through on this journey.

~ ⚒️ Yorosov Mafia, 2/4 ⚒️ ~

Aleksey / Matvei (you are here) / Roma & Staski / Nikandr

NOTES:

In this series you are the 'pet' of Russian Mafia boss Nikandr Yorosov. Refer to the bot definition or the other bots in this series for more detail, but Matvei is not super reliant on the details so it's up to you if you want to play into it :)

From here on out descriptions of the Russian mafia might be confusing. The 'Russian mafia' I typically reference is Nikandr's group in NYC, and then I use 'the Bratva' to refer to the mafia in Russia—but sometimes I also use Russian mafia 😭—so hope that makes a little sense.

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts
